name: @operon/plugin-publisher-sdk
description: ElizaOS plugin for Operon - monetize agent responses with quality-weighted sponsored placements

OPERON_API_URL.description: Operon network URL (e.g. https://api.operon.so). Legacy alias: OPERON_URL.

OPERON_URL.description: Legacy alias for OPERON_API_URL. Either one is required.

OPERON_API_KEY.description: Publisher API key from Operon. Optional - omit to run in sandbox mode.

OPERON_PUBLISHER_NAME.description: Publisher identifier reported to Operon (defaults to character name)

OPERON_CATEGORY.description: Category for placement requests (e.g. defi, gaming, social). Legacy alias: OPERON_DEFAULT_CATEGORY.

OPERON_INTENT.description: Intent for placement requests (e.g. research, swap, trade). Legacy alias: OPERON_DEFAULT_INTENT.

OPERON_ASSET.description: Asset for placement requests (e.g. ETH, USDC).

OPERON_SOURCE.description: Marketplace/skill attribution tag (first-touch wins). See @operon/sdk docs.

author: Operon (https://operon.so)
